text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: It's time for the Hakodate Kinen,<n>Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Nothing else will do but a winner'sstar next to my name! It isHakodate, after all!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Do you see that moat over there?<n>That's the
star-shaped Goryokaku<n>Fort!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I want to earn a star that outshines<n>even
Goryokaku! What a sight that<n>would be!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
So let's get going and have<n>ourselves a
star-spangled<n>extravaganza!
